name: engineering-learning-hub
description: StackDepth — self-paced engineering learning hub. Visual HTML lessons for AI Agents, Context Engineering, REST, and backend systems. No build step, no dependencies.
//: The site is plain static HTML with zero dependencies — open index.html or any
lesson directly, or publish the folder via GitHub Pages. This file only provides
a tiny local static server for the optional in-browser EPUB reader (reader.html),
which is for personal/local use; the EPUB files themselves are not committed.
WHY THE SERVER: Chromium browsers (Brave, Chrome, Edge) block fetch() of file://
resources, so reader.html cannot load .epub files straight from disk. Serving the
folder over http:// (same-origin) makes those requests legal in every browser.
npm start              -> serves this folder, then open http://localhost:8000/
server.js uses only Node built-ins and reader.html loads vendored libs from lib/,
so there is nothing to install — no node_modules, no lockfile.
